knowledge_base.about: Lumbini ICT Campus is one of the leading and renowned institutions known for its dedication to quality education. It is designed to disseminate quality education within a quality framework, helping students make the most of themselves academically and socially. The campus has well-managed administrative staff with highly qualified, experienced teachers, guided by a dedicated management committee in conformity with national educational goals.
knowledge_base.vision: Lumbini ICT Campus envisions that every student has his/her own potential and ensures that he/she is provided with every opportunity to make maximum use of it. The campus intends to develop a center of excellence for technical education and research.
knowledge_base.mission: To develop Lumbini ICT Campus as a distinct college by implementing a high-tech education system in order to produce skilled human resources required for a technologically advanced world.
knowledge_base.commitment: To offer an environment to produce skilled human resources capable of competing locally and globally.

courses_offered.full_name: Bachelor in Science, Computer Science and Information Technology

chairman.name: Mr. Kailash Koirala
chairman.title: Chairman
chairman.message: Lumbini ICT Campus paves international quality education at an affordable cost. Proper development of both head and heart leads an individual towards sustainable fast growth in career and life.

principal.name: Mr. Pratap Koirala
principal.title: Principal / Campus Chief
principal.message: We have a lot of things to be proud of which includes quality education, well equipped laboratories, modern physical infrastructure, exposure of students in different intra/inter campus competitions, and a healthy studying environment.

faq.question: What is Lumbini ICT Campus?
faq.answer: Lumbini ICT Campus is a reputed institution located in Gaindakot-4, Kaligandaki Chowk, Nepal, offering bachelor-level programs in CSIT, BIM, BCA, and BHM.

faq.question: What courses does Lumbini ICT Campus offer?
faq.answer: Lumbini ICT Campus offers BSc. CSIT, BIM, BCA, and BHM bachelor-level programs.

faq.question: How can I contact Lumbini ICT Campus?
faq.answer: You can call 078-502188 / 078-503206, email mailto@lict.edu.np, or visit the campus at Gaindakot-4, Kaligandaki Chowk.

faq.question: Who is the principal of Lumbini ICT Campus?
faq.answer: Mr. Pratap Koirala is the Principal / Campus Chief of Lumbini ICT Campus.

faq.question: Who is the chairman of Lumbini ICT Campus?
faq.answer: Mr. Kailash Koirala is the Chairman of Lumbini ICT Campus.

Lumbini ICT Campus is located at Gaindakot-4, Kaligandaki Chowk, Nawalpur, Nepal. You can contact them at phone numbers 078-502188, 078-503206, or visit their website at https://lict.edu.np/ for more information.

**Pratap Koirala:**
Pratap Koirala is the Principal/Campus Chief of Lumbini ICT Campus, located at Gaindakot-4, Nawalpur, Nepal. He is the head administrator of the campus and is responsible for overseeing the overall operations and academic programs.
